content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad weakness across indices with Nifty -0.90%, IT leading losses -3.49%, VIX up +3.93% to 19.32 signaling elevated fear. Book is 72% deployed with unrealized loss today; priority is position management and selective SL tightening, not new entries. Global cues also negative (Nasdaq -0.89%).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 6.4% from entry but thesis (Q4 PAT +35% YoY, NII +18.8%, CASA 52.5%, analyst targets 88-90) intact. CMP 76.27 sits right at SL 75 — breaking 75 confirms thesis failure so current SL is already the line in the sand. Not tightening further (would cut at noise); not loosening. If 75 holds, bounce to 80+ likely as PSU bank momentum resumes."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op on values but SL already at entry/breakeven (984) so position is risk-free. P&L +2.8%, current stored SL is already at entry. No change needed — actually this is a no-op. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge down 1.2% on US-Iran ceasefire-driven retracement. VIX still elevated, geopolitical tail risk not gone. SL 119 (-5% from entry) appropriate for ETF volatility. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, rev +23%, EBITDA margin 26.3%), near 52w high, FMCG defensive showing relative strength. Up only +0.4% so no trail yet. SL 1385 (-2% from entry) is tight and appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, provisional Q4 business update strong (advances +25%, deposits +23%). Full Q4 audited results Apr 25-27 — binary event risk 2-3 days out. +0.6% P&L, SL 1040 at -0.9% provides near-breakeven protection. Not trailing higher into event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, pharma defensive, Q4 results Apr 29. Up +0.5%, SL 675 at -0.9% close to breakeven. Let results play out — 4 trading days away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.2% today. Q4 results Apr 30 ahead; FMCG rural recovery intact. SL 2260 (-4.7%) is wide but within risk budget (20 qty × 2372 = ~4.75% portfolio × 4.7% SL = 0.22% port risk). Hold through results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.9%. Defensive power utility with summer peak demand tailwind. Q4 results May 15. SL 388 (-4.1%) within budget. No urgency to modify."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high, +83% 1Y rally, but JM Financial expects Q4 PAT -12.3% YoY; earnings Apr 29 could trigger sell-on-news. Stock already ~20% above consensus Rs 177 target. SL 205 (-4.2%) gives some room. Watching closely — if CMP breaks 210 intraday tomorrow, consider EXIT pre-results. Today: HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 75 is the thesis-break line. CMP 76.27 is right at the edge; don't tighten further into noise. If 75 breaks intraday, it will trigger organically."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (984) — position is risk-free. +2.8% P&L not yet at the +4% threshold to trail to last -2%. Let it extend toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 appropriate for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.4% P&L below +2% trail threshold. SL 1385 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Audited Q4 results Apr 25-27 — not trailing into binary event. Current SL 1040 is near-breakeven protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 29; current SL close to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small position, wide SL within risk budget. Q4 Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor loss, structural thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 29 binary; monitor intraday for weakness signal to pre-empt results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL Q4 beat + anode commercial production is a genuine standout catalyst (+9.55% with 1.1x vol) but 52w high breakout into a tape that's down -0.9% with VIX +3.93% is not the right tick to chase. Wait for pullback to 540-560 and reassess post Apr 27 earnings call. CLEAN 12.8x volume is compelling data but Q3 PAT -30% YoY and premium 32x PE argue for waiting on catalyst clarity. COCHINSHIP/GRSE defence cluster is extended (+24% in April already), avoid adding cluster concentration. ICICIBANK post-Q4 was notably absent from deep-dive data. EMCURE and OFSS both had divergent strength but premium valuations/event risk keep them observational.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 72% deployed with 9 positions — at the deployment hysteresis threshold. Today's tape (Nifty -0.9%, VIX +3.9%, IT -3.5%) is NOT an add day, it's a manage day. Sector concentration check: Banking/Financials = MAHABANK (~10%) + PNBHOUSING (~8%) + AUBANK (~18.5%) = ~36.5% — AT the 35% sector cap. CANNOT add more financials. Power cluster = NTPC (~5%) + ADANIPOWER (~5%) = ~10%, under limit. FMCG = NESTLEIND (~12%) + HINDUNILVR (~4.7%) = ~17%, fine. Next 3 trading days have 4 earnings events (AUBANK Apr 25-27, GRSE Apr 27-28, ADANIPOWER/GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30) — portfolio is earnings-loaded. Primary job this week is event management, not adding. If ADANIPOWER shows pre-results distribution, consider trimming given it's ~20% above consensus target. Cash buffer at 27.6% is healthy; preserve it."
}
